name: Armed Forces Medical College

scholarships.name: AFMC Merit Scholarship
scholarships.description: Available to cadets with top academic performance and strong service records.

deadlines.description: Candidates must qualify NEET before AFMC shortlisting.
Shortlisted candidates complete the AFMC screening process after counseling.

boardNotes.CBSE: CBSE applicants should target very high PCB scores and be ready for the medical fitness assessment.
boardNotes.IB: IB students should take Biology and Chemistry at HL and convert scores competitively for PCB equivalence.
boardNotes.State Board: State board applicants should ensure PCB marks remain strong because AFMC shortlisting is highly score driven.

ranking: Top military medical college in India

name: Madras Medical College

scholarships.name: Tamil Nadu Government Scholarship
scholarships.description: Supports eligible students from economically weaker and reserved category backgrounds.

deadlines.description: NEET qualification is mandatory for MBBS admission.
Tamil Nadu counseling manages seat allotment after NEET results.

boardNotes.CBSE: CBSE applicants should keep PCB and English strong and track Tamil Nadu counseling documentation closely.
boardNotes.IB: IB students should present HL Biology and Chemistry for smoother equivalence review.
boardNotes.State Board: Tamil Nadu state board students benefit from curriculum familiarity but still need a top NEET score.

ranking: Leading government medical college in South India

name: Dr. Ram Manohar Lohiya National Law University

admissionRequirements.internationalStudentNotes: Foreign national and NRI applicants should watch for supernumerary seat notifications and provide equivalent school transcripts.

scholarships.name: UP State Scholarship
scholarships.description: Financial assistance is available for eligible students under state and university schemes.

deadlines.description: Register for CLAT through the Consortium portal.

ranking: Leading private law school in India
